title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test the POST /api/auth/login endpoint with valid email and password to ensure successful login returns status 200 with ok true and sets session cookie.

title: postapiauthregisterwithvaliddata
description: Test the POST /api/auth/register endpoint with valid email and password to ensure new user account creation returns status 201 with user and session data.

title: postapiauthlogoutwithvalidsession
description: Test the POST /api/auth/logout endpoint with a valid session cookie to ensure the session is ended and returns status 200 ok.

title: getapiauthmewithvalidsession
description: Test the GET /api/auth/me endpoint with a valid session cookie to retrieve the current user profile and receive status 200 with profile data.

title: postapiauthforgotpasswordwithvalidemail
description: Test the POST /api/auth/forgot-password endpoint with a registered email to request a password reset email and receive status 200 confirmation.

title: postapiauthresetpasswordwithvalidtoken
description: Test the POST /api/auth/reset-password endpoint with a valid reset token and new password to set a new password and receive status 200 ok.

title: postapiprojectswithvalidsessionanddata
description: Test the POST /api/projects endpoint with a valid session cookie and valid project data to create a new project and receive status 201 with project details.

title: getapiprojectsprojectidwithvalidsession
description: Test the GET /api/projects/[projectId] endpoint with a valid session cookie and membership to retrieve project details including environments and receive status 200.

title: postapiprojectsprojectidmemberswithvalidsessionanddata
description: Test the POST /api/projects/[projectId]/members endpoint with a valid session cookie and valid member invitation data to add a member and receive status 201 with member details.

title: getapiprojectsenvironmentsenvidentrieswithvalidsession
description: Test the GET /api/environments/[envId]/entries endpoint with a valid session cookie to list config entries for the environment and receive status 200 with config entries array.
